name: Throne Room
description:
This large room is rather large.  A throne sits on the east wall below a
hole in the ceiling.  The throne almost dominates the room.  No one is
sitting in it.  The wall is decorated to look like pillars surround the
room.  The annex is to the west whilst you are not sure what is above.

exits.description: The Throne Room Annex is to the west.
You can't see what is above this room.

extra_descriptions.description:
What a useless concept.  Why didn't the designer just put actual pillars
in?

This is a large ugly thing that you are repulsed by.  You can think of
no conceivable reason why the lizardmen keep it here.
